title: Visualizing Edge Connectivity and Minimum Edge Cuts
description: A series of graphs demonstrating the concept of edge connectivity (λ(G)), showcasing a graph with a minimum edge cut, a disconnected graph after the cut's removal, and highlighting the edge-disjoint paths that prove the connectivity value.
elements: Original Graph G with vertices and edges
Minimum Edge Cut (set of edges highlighted)
relationships: Removing the highlighted Minimum Edge Cut disconnects the Original Graph G into Disconnected Graph G'
The number of edges in the Minimum Edge Cut equals the number of Edge-Disjoint Paths (by Menger's Theorem), which is the edge connectivity λ(G)
